articles.title: One for the history books: What we know about the European heat wave
articles.summary: Europe is still taking stock of a powerful heat wave in late June, but experts are already confident it ranks among the worst ever recorded—even rivaling a freak 2003 episode.

articles.title: Dangerous heat wave roasts America's big birthday party

articles.title: June heatwave may have killed around 20,000 people in Europe
articles.summary: It will be some months before the true toll of Europe's worst-ever heatwave is confirmed, but researchers can estimate a death count based on how many people died in Europe during previous hot periods
